results.description: 修复 orders 表中不存在的 revenue 字段
results.original_sql: SELECT SUM(revenue) AS sales_amount FROM orders
results.original_error:
数据库会话错误: Binder Error: Referenced column "revenue" not found in FROM clause!
Candidate bindings: "orders.status"
LINE 1: SELECT SUM(revenue) AS sales_amount FROM orders LI...
                   ^
results.repaired_sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS sales_amount FROM orders
results.repair_reason: 错误原因是原始 SQL 中引用了不存在的列 'revenue'，而根据数据库 Schema，orders 表中对应的销售额字段是 'total_amount'（DECIMAL 类型），并非 'revenue'。因此将 SUM(revenue) 替换为 SUM(total_amount) 即可修复。

results.description: 修复不存在的 order_detail 表
results.original_sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS quantity_sold FROM order_detail GROUP BY product_id
results.original_error:
数据库会话错误: Catalog Error: Table with name order_detail does not exist!
Did you mean "orders"?
LINE 1: ...d, SUM(quantity) AS quantity_sold FROM order_detail GROUP BY product_id LIMIT ...
                                                  ^
results.repaired_sql: SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS quantity_sold FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id
results.repair_reason: 原始 SQL 中引用了不存在的表 'order_detail'，根据数据库 Schema，存储订单明细（含 product_id 和 quantity）的表实际名为 'order_items'。已将 FROM 子句中的表名修正为 'order_items'，其余逻辑（按 product_id 聚合计量）保持不变。

results.description: 修复查询客户名称时缺失的 customers 关联
results.original_error:
数据库会话错误: Binder Error: Referenced column "customer_name" not found in FROM clause!
Candidate bindings: "orders.customer_id"
LINE 1: SELECT order_id, customer_name FROM orders LIMIT 1000
                         ^
results.repaired_sql: SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name FROM orders AS o JOIN customers AS c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
results.repair_reason: 原始 SQL 中试图从 'orders' 表直接选择 'customer_name' 字段，但该字段并不存在于 'orders' 表中（仅存在于 'customers' 表）。需通过 JOIN 关联 'orders' 和 'customers' 表（基于 customer_id），才能获取 customer_name。修复后使用表别名 o 和 c 提高可读性，并正确关联两表。

results.description: 将 MySQL DATE_FORMAT 修复为 DuckDB 日期函数
results.original_sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS sales_amount FROM orders GROUP BY month
results.original_error:
数据库会话错误: Catalog Error: Scalar Function with name date_format does not exist!
Did you mean "format"?
LINE 1: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(order_date, '%Y-%m') AS mon...
               ^
results.repaired_sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) AS month, SUM(total_amount) AS sales_amount FROM orders GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', order_date)
results.repair_reason: DuckDB 不支持 MySQL 风格的 DATE_FORMAT 函数，错误提示建议使用 'format'，但实际 DuckDB 中日期格式化应使用 strftime() 函数。strftime('%Y-%m', order_date) 可正确提取年月字符串（如 '2023-05'）。注意：GROUP BY 必须与 SELECT 中的表达式一致（不能直接用别名 month，因 DuckDB 在 GROUP BY 中不支持引用 SELECT 别名），故需重复 strftime 表达式。

results.description: 修复 DuckDB 不支持的 strftime 季度格式符
results.original_sql: SELECT strftime(order_date, '%q') AS quarter, SUM(total_amount) AS sales_amount FROM orders GROUP BY quarter
results.original_error: 数据库会话错误: Invalid Input Error: Failed to parse format specifier %q: Unrecognized format for strftime/strptime: %q
results.repaired_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM order_date) AS quarter, SUM(total_amount) AS sales_amount FROM orders GROUP BY quarter
results.repair_reason: DuckDB 不支持 strftime 的 '%q' 格式符（该格式符在 SQLite 中可用，但 DuckDB 不兼容）。应改用标准 SQL 函数 EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM date_column) 来提取季度。此外，strftime 返回字符串类型，而季度需参与数值分组和排序，EXTRACT 直接返回 INTEGER，语义更准确且避免隐式转换问题。

results.description: 修复 regions 表中不存在的 province_name 字段
results.original_sql: SELECT province_name, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM regions GROUP BY province_name
results.original_error:
数据库会话错误: Binder Error: Referenced column "province_name" not found in FROM clause!
Candidate bindings: "regions.province"
LINE 1: ...S customer_count FROM regions GROUP BY province_name LIMIT 1000
                                                  ^
results.repaired_sql: SELECT province, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM regions GROUP BY province
results.repair_reason: 错误原因是查询中引用了不存在的列 'province_name'；根据 Schema，regions 表中实际字段名为 'province'（而非 'province_name'），因此需将 SELECT 和 GROUP BY 中的 'province_name' 替换为 'province'。
